npcinfo_BearCharmPedestal_Desc: It's inscribed with little etchings of bears.
npcinfo_CasinoWorkOrderSign_Desc: Who knows where Irkima gets these work orders...
npcinfo_CatCharmPedestal_Desc: It's inscribed with little etchings of cats.
npcinfo_Desert1WorkOrderSign_Desc: Gremix has posted some work orders here.
npcinfo_EltibuleWorkOrderSign_Desc: Thimble Pete transcribes orders onto papers and sticks them on this board.
npcinfo_FaeRealm1WorkOrderSign_Desc: "Work with the famous Ogamboe the Deal Hunter!"
npcinfo_GuildAltar_Desc: Looks like guilds can register here.
npcinfo_KurMountainsWorkOrderSign_Desc: Laura Neth keeps track of her recent orders here.
npcinfo_NPC_Arlan_Desc: With a frown and a squint.
npcinfo_NPC_Ashk_Desc: He's examining a piece of entrail.
npcinfo_NPC_AuShin_Desc: A strong deer who looks very relaxed.
npcinfo_NPC_Bahdba_Desc: She stares past you, as if she is watching you and many other things all at once.
npcinfo_NPC_BellemaDeftwhisper_Desc: She's very focused on her crossbows.
npcinfo_NPC_Blanche_Desc: She hides a smile as she talks with her friend Rita.
npcinfo_NPC_Braigon_Desc: He's immaculately dressed, but smells like feet.
npcinfo_NPC_CoreyTheCroaker_Desc: He's laughing and making weird noises.
npcinfo_NPC_Corinth_Desc: Speaking aloud to himself as he writes
npcinfo_NPC_Crelpin_Preferences_0_Name: Magic Equipment with Animal Handling Prerequisites
npcinfo_NPC_CynthiaRolfe_Desc: A scruffy, no-nonsense woman with a piercing glare.
npcinfo_NPC_Daisy_Desc: She smiles nervously at you and then walks on.
npcinfo_NPC_Dhakmar_Preferences_0_Name: Barrels of Hard Liquor (Aged or Not)
npcinfo_NPC_DovieDarbie_Desc: Has a cruel look about her
npcinfo_NPC_DrummondStonecurl_Desc: Roasting something over the open fire
npcinfo_NPC_DyeMonster_Desc: A little automaton loaded with advanced dye recipes.
npcinfo_NPC_DyePlaceholder_Desc: A temporary NPC! He sells dye recipes.
npcinfo_NPC_Elaina_Desc: She's looking around nervously, mumbling 'bzz' to herself
npcinfo_NPC_Eleme_Desc: He snarls with determination as he studies a map.
npcinfo_NPC_Fainor_Desc: He's sweating profusely from the fire, but intensely focused on some sort of potato dish.
npcinfo_NPC_Fazzi_Desc: She glares at you with suspicion and hope.
npcinfo_NPC_Flia_Desc: Prim and pleasant. But not too pleasant.
npcinfo_NPC_FransescaMuradrake_Desc: A solemn woman with haunted, puffy eyes
npcinfo_NPC_Furlak_Desc: An older Rakshasa with an angry glare.
npcinfo_NPC_GeneralTassadar_Desc: Battleworn and a bit haggard, but his uniform is immaculate
npcinfo_NPC_GeorgeMadler_Desc: He looks older than he probably is.
npcinfo_NPC_Gisli_Preferences_2_Name: Magic Equipment with Animal Handling Prerequisites
npcinfo_NPC_Glajur_Desc: He's studying a dried skull and trying to look nonchalant.
npcinfo_NPC_Gorvessa_Desc: She's stirring stew and thinking about something else.
npcinfo_NPC_Gremix_Desc: Taking a break from the forge.
npcinfo_NPC_Gretchen_Preferences_0_Name: Chairs and Other Things To Sit On
npcinfo_NPC_Gribburn_Desc: He's muttering to himself and scheming.
npcinfo_NPC_Gurki_Desc: A scowl dominates her face, overshadowing even her fancy clothes.
npcinfo_NPC_GuzorHarrison_Desc: His flameproof robe is covered in scorches.
npcinfo_NPC_Hammerlock_Desc: A sleek black cat with a fiery gaze.
npcinfo_NPC_Helena_Desc: She's dirty and annoyed, but she smiles when she catches your eye.
npcinfo_NPC_Hiral_Desc: He is smiling while remembering something fondly.
npcinfo_NPC_Hirochi_Preferences_0_Name: New combat textbooks (for any combat skill)
npcinfo_NPC_Hogan_Desc: He's practicing staff fighting, in the yard, by himself.
npcinfo_NPC_Ichin_Desc: He smiles and squints at you.
npcinfo_NPC_IlvadeleIrasce_Desc: Older woman with a dignified walk
npcinfo_NPC_Irkima_Preferences_2_Name: Potions that Boost Damage from Specific Skills
npcinfo_NPC_JakeTheBuckler_Desc: A bear of a human with a hearty laugh.
npcinfo_NPC_JanetLews_Desc: Older and tired, but not unhappy.
npcinfo_NPC_Jara_Desc: Her eyes are wide with fear.
npcinfo_NPC_Jarmanger_Desc: Pretending that he hasn't noticed you.
npcinfo_NPC_Joe_Desc: Always with a smirk of superiority.
npcinfo_NPC_Jumjab_Desc: He grins at you with a somewhat alarming level of enthusiasm.
npcinfo_NPC_Jumper_Desc: A strong deer who looks very relaxed.
npcinfo_NPC_Kalaba_Desc: He seems proud of his sturdy armor.
npcinfo_NPC_Kleave_Desc: She is doing something disgusting with a fur.
npcinfo_NPC_Kohan_Desc: He grimaces as he works on a weird device.
npcinfo_NPC_Lamashu_Desc: She seems oblivious to the snow in her fur.
npcinfo_NPC_Landri_Desc: She is trying very hard to look nonchalant.
npcinfo_NPC_Larsan_Desc: He is fascinated by a small ring he's holding.
npcinfo_NPC_Lawara_Desc: She seems tired, bored, and dirty.
npcinfo_NPC_LeahBowman_Preferences_0_Nam: Magic Equipment with Animal Handling Prerequisites
npcinfo_NPC_LeonDasterre_Desc: The somewhat-dismissive head of Tennenbrandt University.
npcinfo_NPC_Makara_Desc: An older Rakshasa, eyes half closed.
npcinfo_NPC_Mandibles_Desc: Did that mantis just wink at you?
npcinfo_NPC_Marna_Desc: She's selling an eclectic mix of things.
npcinfo_NPC_Melandria_Desc: She looks concerned that you're here.
npcinfo_NPC_Mittens_Desc: She looks out at the landscape worriedly.
npcinfo_NPC_MoxWarcut_Desc: A little dour, but not too grumpy.
npcinfo_NPC_NelsonBallard_Desc: An older human with a weary but welcoming look.
npcinfo_NPC_Nightshade_Desc: He grins widely, but it's not quite comforting.
npcinfo_NPC_Norbert_Desc: A little sullen, for a pig.
npcinfo_NPC_Oritania_Desc: You can tell she's important. Or thinks she is.
npcinfo_NPC_OrmondNeth_Desc: Bookish but with clear passion for music
npcinfo_NPC_Otis_Desc: Is he angry? Hard to say
npcinfo_NPC_Plaudius_Desc: He stares into the distance even as his hand takes notes.
npcinfo_NPC_Preta_Desc: She is fussing over papers covered in weird runes.
npcinfo_NPC_Rappanel_Desc: He's playing a lute with a far-off look in his eyes.
npcinfo_NPC_Raul_Desc: Surprisingly graceful for such a large creature.
npcinfo_NPC_Richter_Desc: He's reading something from a notebook.
npcinfo_NPC_Rita_Desc: Her eyes are bright with excitement as she gossips with Blanche.
npcinfo_NPC_RoshunTheTraitor_Desc: His face curls into a sort of snarl-smile.
npcinfo_NPC_SandSeer_Preferences_0_Name: Magic Equipment with Fire Magic prerequisites
npcinfo_NPC_Sanja_Desc: She glares at you with cunning eyes.
npcinfo_NPC_SelfDestruct_Desc: Is he angry? Hard to say
npcinfo_NPC_Sereel_Desc: A gaunt figure draped in dark robes.
npcinfo_NPC_SieAntry_Desc: She scouts the distance with a grim snarl.
npcinfo_NPC_SirCoth_Desc: A frumpy man in resplendent armor.
npcinfo_NPC_SirJohnson_Desc: At attention, yet still lost in thought
npcinfo_NPC_SirTaggart_Desc: His eyes periodically dart to the skies
npcinfo_NPC_Sirine_Desc: She's frowning at some tanning chemicals in a bowl.
npcinfo_NPC_Skitters_Desc: A smallish spider with a hat
npcinfo_NPC_SlimOstren_Desc: A jovial man with a mischievous grin
npcinfo_NPC_SpiderPlaceholder_Desc: A temporary NPC! He sells spider-related stuff.
npcinfo_NPC_StablesGolem_Desc: It stares at you without expression
npcinfo_NPC_Syndra_Desc: She looks cold, tired, and worried.
npcinfo_NPC_TerryCollier_Desc: A refined elf with a solemn expression, meticulously arranging jewelry behind the counter.
npcinfo_NPC_TheFloriculturist_Desc: If he had eyes, they'd be scanning the horizon
npcinfo_NPC_Therese_Desc: There's a little bit of dirt on her. How un-elven!
npcinfo_NPC_ThimblePete_Desc: Nice clothes, but a haughty attitude
npcinfo_NPC_Trekker_Desc: Calm but aware of his surroundings
npcinfo_NPC_Ufkar_Desc: He snarls to himself as he works.
npcinfo_NPC_Ukorga_Desc: A little drunk, but in a good mood.
npcinfo_NPC_UnoraVeilmoor_Desc: A quiet, bookish Ice Mage, with a haunted look in her eyes.
npcinfo_NPC_Uriana_Desc: Looking at her hands with interest
npcinfo_NPC_WillemFangblade_Desc: A glint of gold in his gray eyes
npcinfo_NPC_WintriaIrasce_Desc: Reading a book when nobody's looking
npcinfo_NPC_WintriaIrasce_Preferences_0_: New textbooks (for any skill EXCEPT combat skills)
npcinfo_NPC_WynDovaran_Desc: The apparition seems not to see you.
npcinfo_NPC_Xilloh_Desc: A jovial man with a mischievous grin
npcinfo_NPC_Yagreet_Desc: A dainty, calm demeanor barely masks her fatigue
npcinfo_NPC_Yasinda_Desc: She is writing something and looking angry.
npcinfo_NPC_Yavazek_Desc: He chitters at you in an apparently friendly greeting.
npcinfo_NPC_Yetta_Desc: A frazzled elf selling all sorts of junk.
npcinfo_NPC_Zeratak_Desc: This scary bug nods at you in greeting.
npcinfo_RahuWorkOrderSign_Desc: Sheyna keeps this work order list up to date.
npcinfo_SerbuleWorkOrderSign_Desc: Traders pin work orders here for industrious craftsmen to fill.
npcinfo_SunValeWorkOrderSign_Desc: Viedesi painstakingly maintains this listing of current work orders.
npcinfo_VidariaWorkOrderSign_Desc: The City of Statehelm has posted excess work orders here.
